name: clinical_trial_summary
instructions: Focus on the primary trial reported in this article. Ignore cited trials.

fields.name: study_design
fields.description: Type of study (e.g., 'randomized controlled trial', 'cohort', 'case-control', 'cross-sectional', 'case report').

fields.name: n_participants
fields.description: Total number of human participants enrolled. Null if not human or not reported.

fields.name: population
fields.description: One-sentence description of the study population (condition, age range, setting).

fields.name: intervention
fields.description: The primary intervention, drug, or exposure studied.

fields.name: comparator
fields.description: Control or comparator arm. Null if single-arm.

fields.name: primary_outcomes
fields.description: Primary outcome measures as defined by the authors.

fields.name: key_findings
fields.description: 2-3 sentence summary of the primary results, including direction and any effect size the authors report.

fields.name: funding_sources
fields.description: Named funders or sponsors. Empty list if not reported.

fields.name: registered
fields.description: True if a trial registration ID (e.g., NCT number) is mentioned.
